title: Devteam Agents & Skills policy manifest — ADR-0128 §9-§12, §18 (WF-0064)
note: Index of the devteam policy tables. Single source for skill registration, trigger truth-table and the playbook journey — the runtime NEVER embeds these (ADR-0129 §4). policyVersion is the calibration unit's third axis (rule × host × policyVersion).

tables.concern: The six trigger-driven skills — identity, owners, artifacts (§11)

changeClasses.observationalAdjustment: shadow/non-blocking trigger tweak; calibration receipt; no ADR when enforcement power is unchanged.
changeClasses.automaticPromotion: rule evolves up to its maximumAutomaticLevel on evidence; no further human action per transition.
changeClasses.changeOfMaximumAuthority: raising maximumAutomaticLevel / accepted evidence types / fail mode — requires a governed Decision.
changeClasses.materialEnforcementChange: new mandatory skill / new block case / reduced fail-open — requires a Decision and resets rule confidence.
